findings.message: Agent has no complete input/output examples; only an output template is shown without a real worked example.
Vague qualifier "adequately" in the description — does not specify the threshold or criteria for adequacy.
Body references a `via_douyin_mcp` method and `cookie:douyin` dependency not present in frontmatter `methods` or `fallback_chain`.

Body describes a `via_douyin_mcp` implementation path with `cookie:douyin` dependency but neither appears in the frontmatter `methods` list or `fallback_chain`; the described behavior is unreachable via the standard routing mechanism.
"How To Search (Planned)" repeats the `algolia_search` method name as three separate bullets with no distinguishing content.
`experience_digest` field uses `experience/experience.md` (subdirectory) while project-wide convention is `experience.md` (sibling file).

`experience_digest: experience/experience.md` deviates from all other skills in the codebase which use `experience_digest: experience.md`; may prevent runtime experience loader from finding the digest file.
Body contains only three short sentences and two stub Known Quirks bullets. Missing "When to Choose It" and "How To Search" sections.
"How To Search" is a single sentence; body mixes Chinese and English without a language-tagging convention. No method documentation for the HTML parsing approach.
Missing "When to Choose It", "How To Search", and "Known Quirks" sections present in the canonical channel skill format.
`experience_digest` field uses `experience/experience.md` (subdirectory) while project-wide convention is `experience.md` (sibling file).

`experience_digest: experience/experience.md` deviates from all other skills in the codebase which use `experience_digest: experience.md`; may prevent runtime experience loader from finding the digest file.
Missing required `name` field in YAML frontmatter; NLPM scanner cannot register this command.
Missing `name` field in YAML frontmatter; required for NL artifact registration.
No explicit empty-input guard; `$ARGUMENTS` is passed directly to `run_clarify` with no check for empty string.
npm installer wrapper executes `bash -c 'curl -fsSL <remote-install.sh> | bash'` without cryptographic verification; triggered when user runs `npx autosearch-ai` and autosearch is not installed.

E2B sandbox setup string runs `curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh` to bootstrap uv without checksum verification; runs inside an isolated E2B sandbox but is an untrusted-download-and-exec pattern.
`pip3 install git+https://github.com/0xmariowu/Autosearch.git` installs from the repository's HEAD with no version pin or commit hash; supply-chain risk if the repository is compromised between runs.

Pre-scan matched base64 decode+exec pattern. The code base64-encodes an internally-constructed Python script and sends it to an E2B sandbox via printf|base64 -d; the decoded content is a known-safe test script, not user-supplied data.
Installer appends `export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"` to user shell profiles (~/.zshrc, ~/.bashrc, ~/.profile) without a guard for headless/CI environments.
Pre-scan matched curl|sh pattern, but the text appears inside an `echo` message string — it is displayed as a hint to the user, not executed.
Missing required `name` field in YAML frontmatter; NLPM scanner cannot register this command.
npm installer wrapper executes `bash -c 'curl -fsSL <remote-install.sh> | bash'` without cryptographic verification; triggered when user runs `npx autosearch-ai` and autosearch is not installed.

E2B sandbox setup string runs `curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh` to bootstrap uv without checksum verification; runs inside an isolated E2B sandbox but is an untrusted-download-and-exec pattern.
`pip3 install git+https://github.com/0xmariowu/Autosearch.git` installs from the repository's HEAD with no version pin or commit hash; supply-chain risk if the repository is compromised between runs.
